title: asteriscus maritimus proles littoralis
intro: Asteriscus maritimus proles littoralis, also known as the littoral or coastal marsh-aster, is a subspecies of the Asteriscus maritimus plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The medicinal properties of Asteriscus maritimus proles littoralis are believed to aid in the relief of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
